return(function(D,b,L,H,p,J,X,v,h,R,z,M,C,k,y,E,G,P,F,V,K,s,O)O,h,k,C,G,z,M,P,y,s,E,V,K,v,F,R=function(D,I)local b=R(I)local L=function(L)return z(D,{L},I,b)end return L end,{},function(D,I)local b=R(I)local L=function(L,H,p,J,X)return z(D,{L,H,p,J,X},I,b)end return L end,function(D)local I,z=-1010846+1010847,D[-861453+861454]while z do V[z],I=V[z]-(-245934-(-245935)),I+(758147+-758146)if
